overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a foggy prairie path with railroad tracks. The scene features atmospheric morning light filtering through mist, with encounters including a passing horse rider and natural landmarks like a large oak tree and abandoned wagon.

events.description: passing the wooden signpost on the right side of the tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railroad tracks through the misty prairie grassland

entered.detail: gravel railroad tracks running through the prairie grass
weathered wooden cross-shaped signpost beside the tracks
tall golden-brown grass covering the rolling prairie
tall golden-brown grass covering the rolling prairie

segments.scene_description: The character walks along railroad tracks cutting through a foggy prairie landscape. A wooden signpost stands on the right side of the tracks, which the character passes by as they continue forward through the tall golden grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie dirt path with abandoned wagon

events.description: horse rider passes by on the right side of the path
railroad tracks end and path becomes dirt trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as a mounted rider passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: riding a horse past the player character on the right side of the trail

entered.detail: abandoned wooden wagon with broken wheels sitting beside the path
large spreading oak tree with dense foliage visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The path transitions from railroad tracks to a dirt trail. A horse rider passes by on the right, and an abandoned broken wagon sits beside the path. A large oak tree becomes visible in the distance on the right as the fog continues to obscure the horizon.

events.description: passing under the branches of the large oak tree

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned wagon and under the spreading oak tree branches

segments.scene_description: The character passes the abandoned wagon and walks under the canopy of the large oak tree. After passing the tree, the trail continues through the open prairie with visibility decreasing as the fog thickens into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy prairie path that transitions from industrial railroad tracks to a secluded natural trail. It begins with the character walking beside railroad tracks through tall golden grass, passing a wooden signpost as the mist clings to the landscape. As the tracks give way to a dirt trail, the camera captures a passing horse rider and an abandoned broken wagon resting by the path. The scene then shifts toward a large oak tree, moving beneath its wide canopy before the trail opens back into the prairie. Finally, the path stretches forward as the horizon disappears into a thickening wall of fog.
